capabilities: monitor 25 civilization axes via web intelligence
LLM synthesis via Groq (llama-3.3-70b) + Gemini fallback
audio transcription via Groq Whisper API
real data: NOAA CO2, NASA GISTEMP, World Bank WDI, GBIF
limitations: Limited RAM (14.9GB) — cannot run local LLMs or ChromaDB at full load
No local GPU — all inference via cloud APIs (rate-limited)
No persistent process — cycle must be triggered manually or via scheduler
